overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a yellow plaid shirt walking through a rainy, neon-lit urban street at night. The character passes traditional Japanese-style buildings and modern skyscrapers, crosses the road, and approaches a retro-futuristic fast-food restaurant with a large glowing 'PieZ' sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with traditional low-rise buildings

events.description: player character moves to the right and exits the camera frame

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk away from the camera, gradually moving toward the right side of the frame

entered.detail: massive illuminated stadium-like arch dominating the distant skyline
aircraft with red navigation lights hovering above the arch
low-rise wooden structures with tiled roofs lining the sidewalk
tall glass building with illuminated windows and signage
overhead electrical wires crisscrossing the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character in a yellow plaid shirt walking along a wet sidewalk at night. Traditional low-rise buildings line the left while a modern skyscraper rises on the right. In the distance, a massive illuminated arch structure dominates the skyline beneath a hazy night sky with a flying vehicle hovering above.

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the sidewalk, temporarily out of camera view behind the right edge

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking toward the camera on the sidewalk ahead

entered.detail: large green industrial dumpster overflowing with garbage bags
wooden power pole with transformers and multiple wire connections

segments.scene_description: The camera continues moving forward along the sidewalk after the player character exits the frame. Other pedestrians appear in the distance walking toward the camera. The flying vehicle and modern skyscraper exit view while a large trash dumpster and utility poles become prominent on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing approaching neon-lit commercial building

events.description: player character reappears from the left side and begins crossing the street
transitioning from sidewalk to street surface while approaching the PieZ restaurant

agents.ego_description: crossing the asphalt street from left to right, heading toward the brightly lit restaurant

entered.detail: large pink and purple neon sign reading 'PieZ' mounted on a tall pole
large empty billboard frame with support structure
several vehicles parked in the restaurant lot ahead

segments.scene_description: The player character reappears from the left and crosses the asphalt street toward a brightly lit fast-food restaurant. The large pink 'PieZ' neon sign becomes visible ahead, replacing the traditional buildings that fall behind. The camera follows the character's movement across the open road toward the parking lot.

scene_state.functional_zone: restaurant parking lot with retro-futuristic architecture

events.description: approaching and passing parked vehicles in the PieZ parking lot

agents.ego_description: walking through the parking lot toward the restaurant entrance, navigating between parked cars

entered.detail: retro-futuristic restaurant building with large glass windows and orange accent lighting
green illuminated vending machine near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters the PieZ restaurant parking lot, passing parked cars that shift from the right to the left of the frame. The massive neon sign looms overhead casting pink light on the wet pavement. The building's retro-futuristic facade with large windows becomes the focal point as the character approaches the entrance, while the distant billboard recedes into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy, neon-lit urban street that transitions from a mix of traditional and modern architecture toward a glowing retro-futuristic restaurant. It begins by following a character in a yellow plaid shirt along a wet sidewalk, flanked by low-rise buildings and a towering skyscraper beneath a hazy sky where a flying vehicle hovers. As the character momentarily exits the frame, the camera glides forward past utility poles and trash dumpsters while distant pedestrians approach. The scene then shifts as the character reappears to cross the asphalt street, leaving the traditional buildings behind as a massive pink PieZ neon sign emerges in the distance. Finally, the camera follows the character into the restaurant parking lot, passing parked cars as the pink light reflects off the wet pavement and the building's futuristic facade becomes the central focus.
